The '''''Mother's Valkyrie''''' was a [[Paqwe]] diplomatic [[Starship/Legends|ship]] sent to [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] and was allowed to be damaged by the [[Yevetha]] by [[Belezaboth Ourn]].

{{Ship-stub}}

==Appearances==
*''[[Before the Storm]]'' {{1st}}
*''[[Shield of Lies]]''
